candidate_lever_options.description: Require the chosen stock-side entry condition to remain valid for a small number of consecutive trading days before entry so Layer 2 filters more transient signals without changing Layer 1, exits, or sizing.
Use a stock-side trend-quality check such as a rising short-term EMA slope as a Layer 2 gate, focusing on trend quality rather than reopening the absolute momentum floor.
Use a quality check on whether stock momentum is improving rather than only positive, keeping the change inside Layer 2 entry quality without expanding the rejected momentum-floor range.

why_this_lever_not_momentum_floor_again: The absolute momentum-floor hypothesis was already tested across the locked narrow range and no approved variant passed the locked minimum pass criteria, so reopening that threshold family would only revisit a rejected path without new justification.
why_not_layer_1_next: The OOS-versus-holdout regime-share audit concluded `comparable_regime_share`, so there is not yet a strong basis to move the next lever toward Layer 1 regime rules or regime sensitivity.
what_stays_frozen: Layer 1 regime rule stays `ihsg_ema50 > ihsg_ema200 AND ihsg_ema50 > prev_ihsg_ema50`.
Time stop stays fixed at 12 days.
Position sizing stays 2% risk per trade and 10% max position cap.
